description_long: This object is a standard Western-style toilet with a rounded bowl and an attached rectangular cistern at the back. The toilet features a visible seat and lid, both of which are contoured to fit the bowl. The cistern is mounted directly above the bowl and includes a flush lever on the left side. The base of the toilet is wide and flared, providing stability and a secure connection to the floor. The overall design is utilitarian, with smooth, gently curved surfaces and a uniform light color. The object appears to be made primarily of ceramic, with some plastic or metal components for the seat and flush mechanism.
description: A standard floor-mounted toilet with a rounded bowl, attached cistern, and visible seat and flush lever. The design is smooth, sturdy, and typical for urban restrooms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open seat, bowl, and the flush lever on the left side of the cistern.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bowl, seat, and the protruding cistern with visible flush lever.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cistern and the base, with no visible seat or flush lever.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the cistern and bowl, with the flush lever not visible.
